description_long: This is a two-story urban storefront with a prominent striped awning extending over the lower facade. The awning features alternating white and orange-red stripes and is supported by a fixed frame attached above the shop's large front windows. The building itself is rendered in muted beige and brown tones, with rectangular windows on the upper floor and a flat roof. A large, stylized arrow sign projects from the right side, likely indicating the entrance or drawing attention to the shop. The awning's canopy is straight-edged and visually distinct, providing shade and shelter to the area immediately in front of the store. The overall design is simple yet inviting, typical of small retail or café establishments in urban neighborhoods.
description: A striped orange-red and white awning extends from a beige two-story storefront, supported by a fixed frame and accented by a large arrow sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped awning, large windows, and a prominent arrow sign on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the awning and the protruding arrow sign.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the building with no awning or windows.
description_view_3: Left side view displaying the side profile of the awning and the building's flat, unadorned wall.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the storefront facade above the main windows
attribute_canopy_pattern: alternating orange-red and white vertical stripes
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with no decorative trim
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame mounted to the building facade
